channel.title: Dad Joke of the Day
channel.description: A fresh dad joke every day. Get the app at dadjokes.vip

item.title: Where were the kings and queens of England crowned?
item.description:
Where were the kings and queens of England crowned?
On their heads.

item.title: What do videos do on their days off?
item.description:
What do videos do on their days off?
They unwind.

item.title: How did you pass the entrance exam for candy-making school?
item.description:
How did you pass the entrance exam for candy-making school?
It was simple. I fudged it.

item.title: Why can you always tell what Dick and Jane will do next?
item.description:
Why can you always tell what Dick and Jane will do next?
They’re so easy to read.

item.title: Why is the library the tallest room in the school?
item.description:
Why is the library the tallest room in the school?
It has the most stories.

item.title: What state is round on both sides but high in the middle?
item.description:
What state is round on both sides but high in the middle?
Ohio.

item.title: Which two words have the most letters in them?
item.description:
Which two words have the most letters in them?
Post office.

item.title: Why did the amoeba flunk the math test?
item.description:
Why did the amoeba flunk the math test?
Because it multiplied by dividing.

item.title: Charlie: Hey, Mom, tomorrow there’s a small PTA meeting. Mom: What do you mean by “small”?
item.description:
Charlie: Hey, Mom, tomorrow there’s a small PTA meeting. Mom: What do you mean by “small”?
Charlie: Well, it’s just you, me, and the principal.
